issues.description: MCP lifespans read WORKSPACE_UUID/ENTITY_WORKSPACE_UUID from env without _validate_workspace_uuid(); silent cross-workspace scoping risk
issues.suggestion: Route env_uuid through _validate_workspace_uuid() in both lifespans + verify workspaces row exists; fall back to resolve_workspace_uuid(_project_root) if not

issues.description: _UNKNOWN_WORKSPACE_UUID pinned-literal check uses assert (stripped under python -O)
JSONL audit log interpolates $tool_name and $feature_id raw (only $file_path escaped)
migration-11-workspace-mapping.json leaks legacy_project_id↔workspace_uuid mapping; not gitignored
issues.suggestion: Add .claude/pd/migrations/ to .gitignore OR delete audit file after migration completes

issues.description: meta-json-guard.sh falls back to $PWD directly without .claude/ marker check (session-start.sh uses detect_project_root)

summary: Approved. Migration 11 forward+reverse is well-engineered. Parameterized queries throughout. fcntl.flock correct. 5 non-blocking findings (1 MED, 4 LOW).
